releases.summary: Initial release of the Consent Clearinghouse — full consent management is now live across patient-level visibility, evidence documentation, and alignment reporting.

updates.title: Consent Health Dashboard
updates.body: View consent health at a glance across your entire book of business with a dedicated dashboard surfacing key consent metrics and trends.

updates.title: Patient-Level Consent Detail
updates.body: Drill into individual patient consent records to review consent status, history, and associated evidence.

updates.title: Evidence Documents
updates.body: Access and review consent evidence documents directly within the platform, eliminating the need to cross-reference external systems.

updates.title: Alignment Report
updates.body: Run the Alignment Report to identify consent misalignment across your book of business and take corrective action proactively.

updates.title: Role-Based Navigation Access
updates.body: Navigation access to CCH is entitlement-controlled per role, ensuring the right users have access to the right consent data.
